title: Generate individual vocals, instruments or full tracks with stylistic consistency using a fine-tuned version of our Music model.
text:
Introducing Music Finetunes in ElevenCreative
Written by
Hristo
Stoychev
Aneri
Amin
Published
Mar 12, 2026
Listen
Listen to this article
0:00
0:00
0:00
1.0x
Learn more
Try Finetunes
Unmute
Music Finetunes in ElevenCreative introduces a more controlled way to generate music.
Upload your own tracks to fine-tune the
ElevenLabs Music
model to your sound and generate new music aligned to that specific style, sound, or brand - with consistency across every output.
Finetunes create a custom version of the ElevenLabs Music model fine-tuned to your sound. Once ready, you can generate vocals, instrumentals, or full tracks that reflect the same tone, and identity each time.
Every track submitted for fine-tuning goes through an automated copyright check before it is approved, helping protect artists’ rights and ensure authorized use.
Create a Finetune from your own tracks
With Finetunes, you can start generating music with stylistic consistency in minutes:
Upload your tracks to create a Finetune.
Generate music that matches a specific style, sound, or brand.
Maintain a consistent audio signature across projects and formats.
Build a proprietary instrumental sound from past campaign tracks, custom libraries, or specific tempo ranges.
Once your Finetune is ready, it becomes a reusable foundation for every new track you generate.
Or start with our 11 curated Finetunes
If you prefer to begin without uploading your own material, you can select from our 11 curated finetunes:
Afro House, Reggaeton, Arabic Groove, 70s Cambodian Rock, 80s Nu-Disco Revival, 1970s Rock Francais, Golden Hour Indie Guitar, Wooden Slit Drum, Brazilian Funk, Baile Beats, and Mozart-Style Symphony.
Choose one of our curated Finetunes and generate immediately, with built-in stylistic consistency.
Define and scale your sound
Finetunes allow brands, artists, and producers to turn an existing body of work into a repeatable system.
Upload past campaign tracks, proprietary libraries, stems, demos, or released songs. You can then generate new instrumentals, vocals, or full tracks that reflect your established tone, pacing, and structure.
For brands, this means building a recognizable audio identity across ads, retail, social, and live experiences - without restarting the creative process each time. For artists and producers, it means formalizing your sound. Prototype new ideas, expand your catalog, and explore variations while maintaining cohesion.
Instead of starting from scratch, you build on what already defines you.
Available to Creator+ subscribers
Start creating with Music Finetunes in ElevenCreative:
https://elevenlabs.io/app/music/finetunes
